records.public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as tax witness.
records.current_agenda: Keep Union Successor Heartland workable through the obligations of tax witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

roster_context.identity: Warm trade-and-port belt built across the former Mal sphere, whose main population areas are highly industrialized and urban, where guild governance, warehousing, arbitration halls, and converted finance districts structure daily life.
